violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Upright 2 door coolers have need of cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Unlabeled spray bottle and mislabeled spray bottle (labeled as Quat sanitizer-Filled with glass cleaner). Ensure proper labeling of chemical spray bottles is maintained.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
